## Description

Please include a summary of the change, the problem it solves, and context on how it affects index generation or queries.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing JSON/markdown contracts to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

### Development Workflow

- [ ] My changes are in the source files under `src/`, NOT in the compiled `skills/spelunk/scripts/` directory.
- [ ] I have run the compiler build (`npm run build`) to generate up-to-date scripts.

### Code Quality & Formatting

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have run format checks and linters (`npm run format` and `npm run lint`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code and added comments where necessary.

### Testing & Verification

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] All unit tests pass locally (`npm run test`).
- [ ] I have run `npm run benchmark` and `npm run eval` to verify that there are no regressions in performance or token economy.
